items.title: Consider including a link to the company website in addition to their jobs page
items.description: Frequently, companies link directly to their HR product (e.g. Greenhouse), but later they switch, the link is broken and... in companies with generic names, it becomes impossible to track them down again.
items.excerpt: Frequently, companies link directly to their HR product (e.g. Greenhouse), but later they switch, the link is broken and... in companies with generic names, it becomes impossible to track them down again.

items.title: `Camaloon` seems to have stopped using teamtailor so the link is broken
items.description:
I've found that `camaloon`'s link is not working, _it seems like_, they stopped using `teamtailor` or the CNAME entry is incorrect as it has been throwing a `404` error for the last days (checked at least 3).

Maybe it makes sense to update or remove the entry.
items.excerpt: I've found that `camaloon`'s link is not working, _it seems like_, they stopped using `teamtailor` or the CNAME entry is incorrect as it has been throwing a `404` error for the last days (checked at least 3). Maybe it...

items.title: Bankflip is now Permisso
items.description: On top of that, their open jobs are not remote but onsite.
items.excerpt: On top of that, their open jobs are not remote but onsite.

items.title: Looking for Dev
items.description:
Looking for Python Fullstack Developer.

Mandatory Skills: Python frameworks (FastAPI, Flask, Django), REST API implementation, Database (PostgreSQL, MSSQL), Terraform, Authentication (OAuth, JWT), SSIS, Microservices, AWS(Lambda, S3)

Preferred: Over 5 years of experience

Nice to Have: LLM and NLP-LLM GenAI Background

Please reach out to me on telegram(@vezcurve) and twitter(@veczurve)

Thanks!
items.excerpt: Looking for Python Fullstack Developer. Mandatory Skills: Python frameworks (FastAPI, Flask, Django), REST API implementation, Database (PostgreSQL, MSSQL), Terraform, Authentication (OAuth, JWT), SSIS, Microservices,...

items.title: Allow tracking links?
items.description:
https://github.com/remote-es/remotes/commit/c75a6f98d58036fce9ecd3351d560df4ca8e71e4 uses a tracking link to identify visits from this site. I think this is nothing very problematic (HTTP referrer more or less provides the same information), but opening a public issue to see if anyone has reasons to adopt a policy to disallow this.

I'll consider that the person submitting that link votes in favor.

I'll keep this open for at least a month.
